criteria.name: AI-Powered Task Management
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to automate task creation, prioritization, and scheduling, adapting to user habits and deadlines to optimize workflow.

criteria.name: AI Meeting Assistance
criteria.description: The app uses AI to record, transcribe, summarize meetings, and manage related tasks and follow-ups, enhancing meeting productivity and information retention.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Content Creation
criteria.description: The app employs AI to generate, edit, and refine written content, including emails, documents, and social media posts, improving writing quality and efficiency.

criteria.name: AI Calendar Management
criteria.description: The app integrates AI to optimize scheduling, protect time for focused work, and manage meetings and appointments efficiently, improving time management and reducing scheduling conflicts.

criteria.name: AI-Enhanced Email Management
criteria.description: The app uses AI to sort, prioritize, and automate email responses, streamlining email handling and improving communication efficiency.
